name: CANDID B CREAM 20GM 1*20GM
description: Prescription medicine used to treat fungal infections including ringworm and athlete's foot.
uses: Infections on toes, inner thighs, limbs
dosage: Apply thinly and evenly to affected areas as prescribed. Clean and dry the area first. External use only.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place. Do not freeze.

name: CANDID POWDER 1*120GM
description: An antifungal dusting powder that treats fungal infections and relieves summer heat-related skin irritation.
uses: Stops irritation in waistline, underarms, inner thighs, and feet
dosage: Dust the powder on the affected region and gently pat. Apply once or twice daily.
storageInstructions: Keep away from direct sunlight. Store in a dry and cool place.

name: CCM 40TAB 1*40TAB
description: A nutritional supplement that helps treat and prevent calcium and vitamin D deficiency.
uses: Treating vitamin D and calcium deficiency
dosage: Take exactly as recommended by the doctor, swallowed whole with water.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.

name: CEFAKIND 250MG 1*10TAB
description: An antibiotic medicine used to treat a variety of bacterial infections affecting the tonsils, throat, sinuses, ears, respiratory tract, urinary tract, skin, and soft tissues.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place & protect from sunlight.

name: CEFOLAC 100 SYP 1*60ML
description: A cephalosporin antibiotic suspension containing Cefixime used to treat various bacterial infections.
storageInstructions: Store below 25°C. Protect from direct sunlight.

name: CETZINE SYRUP 1*60ML
description: An anti-allergic medication used to treat symptoms associated with allergies such as itching, sneezing, watery eyes, running nose, and rashes.
uses: Sneezing, itchy, runny and blocked nose
dosage: Take as directed by the doctor and in doses and duration as prescribed.
storageInstructions: Store at a cool and dry place. Keep out of reach of children and pets.

name: CHESTON COLD
description: A combination medicine used to improve symptoms of common cold and allergy such as sneezing and runny nose.
uses: Relieves blocked nose, fever, chills, breathing difficulty from sinus inflammation
Alleviates allergic symptoms including runny nose, watery eyes, and sneezing
dosage: Take as directed by your doctor. Swallow whole with a glass of water.
storageInstructions: Store in a clean and dry place, protected from moisture, sunlight and heat.

name: CILADUO 5MG 1*10TAB
description: A blood pressure-lowering medication containing cilnidipine that works by relaxing blood vessels to reduce hypertension.
dosage: Swallow whole with water at a fixed time daily.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place, protected from direct sunlight, moisture and heat.
